description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit constructed with a metal frame and wooden shelves. The frame features cross-bracing on the sides for added structural integrity, and the corners are reinforced with metal brackets. The shelving unit has three spacious wooden shelves, each with a natural wood grain finish, providing ample storage or display space. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings. The metal frame is painted a muted gray, contrasting with the warm brown of the wood. In some views, a large, textured ceramic vase is placed next to or in front of the shelving unit, but it is not part of the shelf itself.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with a gray metal frame and three wooden shelves, featuring cross-bracing and reinforced corners. The open design and natural wood finish make it ideal for urban or workshop environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross-braced metal frame and three wooden shelves, with a small bowl on the top shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat wooden shelves and the full depth of the unit, with a large ceramic vase placed beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cross-bracing visible and the large ceramic vase positioned directly in front of the shelving unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shelves and the ceramic vase placed to the left of the unit.
